subcodes.first_line: O thou whose breast is dilated (with joy) for the Kingdom of Truth! Verily I read thy letter which showed that thine inner heart is attracted
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @knowledge; recognition of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
